end local function D(D)return B[D+(-640637-(-654020))]end do local D=string.len local t=table.concat local y=string.char local C=B local i=string.sub local return(function(B,y,C,i,m,l,h,a,r,j,O,f,t,J,g,Z,U,p,u,b,X,c,n)f,b,X,U,t,r,J,n,O,u,g,c,Z,a,p,j=function(B,D)local y=u(D)local C=function(C,i)return t(B,{C;i},D,y)end return C
